katas.title: Scale a Social Media Feed
katas.prompt: A social media app's 'feed' feature works fine at 10K users but becomes slow at 1M users. The current design: for each feed request, query all posts from all followed users, sort by date, return top 50. Design a scalable approach.
criteria: Proposes caching (pre-computed feed or read-time fan-out)
Addresses consistency (how quickly do new posts appear?)
